rows.label: qev012401_MSG0001
rows.name: You've finally arrived![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0002
rows.name:
A fearless expression, and your
movements scream skilled BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm in luck. I was in a bind,
but I managed to cross paths
with someone as capable as you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_JNK0010
rows.name: Reel

rows.label: qev012401_SEL0011
rows.name: You don't understand what he's saying, so ask for details.

rows.label: qev012401_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev012401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if he posted a request on the Quest Board.

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Oh? Did you not come here because
you saw the Quest Board...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0005
rows.name:
No matter. I can't let such
a good opportunity slip by.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0006
rows.name:
Regardless, please
listen to my situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Indeed I did. ...They told me it would take a while to
be posted and that finding a suitable candidate wouldn't
be easy, but you arrived incredibly fast, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Well, the details don't
matter. Right now, I just want
you to listen to my situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0009
rows.name:
I am Roscoll. A member of
the Collepedian Union.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0010
rows.name:
I usually take requests from Granada
Galactic Group and transport
resources like miranium to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0011
rows.name:
However, the other day, the signal from
our transport helicopter vanished near
Sunlit Spring in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0012
rows.name:
I haven't been able to contact
either of the two crew members...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0013
rows.name:
So, we need to head out for a
rescue immediately, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_JNK0030
rows.name: Despair

rows.label: qev012401_SEL0031
rows.name: Lament that both of them were surely killed by native creatures.

rows.label: qev012401_JNK0040
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev012401_SEL0041
rows.name: Insist that Roscoll should go rescue them himself.

rows.label: qev012401_JNK0050
rows.name: Probe

rows.label: qev012401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask if he has any idea what caused this.

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hey now, don't jinx it... Though
nine times out of ten, that's
exactly what happened...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0015
rows.name: No, I mustn't give up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0016
rows.name: I'm not that strong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0017
rows.name:
If I go searching in Nightglow Forest,
I can already see the punchline: me
getting eaten by native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Besides, the helicopter
might be broken down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0019
rows.name:
In other words, the most suitable person is a BLADE
with the ability to perform repairs, strong combat
skills, and who will accept the job for a low reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0020
rows.name:
The cause, you say... This planet is
full of bizarre occurrences. I can't
even begin to guess the cause.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0021
rows.name:
However, Howard and Ciska are
on incredibly bad terms...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0022
rows.name:
Maybe it escalated into a massive
fight involving firearms! Haha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0023
rows.name: ...Putting aside unamusing jokes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'm begging you... Please rescue
Howard and Ciska, who went
missing in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0025
rows.name: Thank you... I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Bring the two of them
back safely to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0027
rows.name:
The point where communication from the transport
helicopter was lost is near Sunlit Spring in
Nightglow Forest. Please be careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0028
rows.name:
If the helicopter is broken,
please help them repair it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0029
rows.name:
If the two of them eloped,
punch them and drag them back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0030
rows.name:
If vicious native creatures
are the cause, you have my
permission to flee back here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0031
rows.name: Thank goodness... They were safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0032
rows.name: But, your mission is to bring them back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0033
rows.name:
Please assist with the helicopter
repairs as well. I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0034
rows.name: I've been waiting for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0035
rows.name:
Both Howard and Ciska have
returned safely like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0036
rows.name:
What's more, the cargo is safe. We
successfully completed the request
from Granada Galactic Group.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0037
rows.name: I don't know how to thank you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Oh no, I should give you your reward
rather than just words of thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0039
rows.name:
Howard and Ciska seem to be
on as bad terms as ever, so
there might be trouble again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0040
rows.name:
I'll be counting on you
again when that happens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0041
rows.name:
Ah, it's you... Thank you.
Ciska has returned safely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012402_JNK0060
rows.name: Urge

rows.label: qev012402_SEL0061
rows.name: Prompt him that you want your reward quickly.

rows.label: qev012402_JNK0070
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev012402_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask what happened to Howard.

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0042
rows.name:
You really are a professional.
Just a BLADE faithfully
carrying out your duties...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0043
rows.name:
I can't say it's your responsibility,
but... Howard is dead...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0044
rows.name: Howard is dead...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0045
rows.name:
The helicopter Ciska was piloting
continued its flight smoothly until
near the West Gate of NLA, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0046
rows.name:
The makeshift repairs must have
caught up with them. It suddenly
became uncontrollable and crashed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0047
rows.name:
Ciska managed to escape, but
Howard didn't make it in time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0048
rows.name:
It's all over. We lost the helicopter,
the cargo, and a precious member.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0049
rows.name:
Ciska is depressed, and we probably won't
be able to operate as a team anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0050
rows.name:
...I don't know what will
happen from here on out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0051
rows.name: ...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0052
rows.name: Ah, I need to hand over your reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0053
rows.name:
I've added a bit more to the
reward than originally promised.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0054
rows.name:
If you feel like it, I'd like
you to go talk to Ciska.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0055
rows.name:
I might not be able to do
anything for her on my own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012401_MSG0056
rows.name: I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]
